zh.Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands: 荷蘭武特雷特武特雷特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk於1040年9月23日出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特可時，他的父親Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbant30歲，母親NN van Isla en Lake20歲。他於1014年與Adelaide de Amiens在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1080年12月15日在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands: 荷兰武特雷特武特雷特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk于1040年9月23日出生在荷兰努-布拉班特可时，他的父亲Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbant30岁，母亲NN van Isla en Lake20岁。他于1014年与Adelaide de Amiens在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1080年12月15日在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk was born on 23 September 1040, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbant, was 30 and his mother, NN van Isla en Lake, was 20. He married Adelaide de Amiens in 1014, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 15 December 1080, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk est né le 23 septembre 1040, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbant, avait 30 ans et sa mère, NN van Isla en Lake, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide de Amiens en 1014, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1080, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk am 23. September 1040 in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbant 30 und seine Mutter NN van Isla en Lake 20. Er hat 1014 in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Adelaide de Amiens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1080 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk è nato il il 23 settembre 1040 nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbant, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, NN van Isla en Lake, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide de Amiens nel 1014, nel Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 dicembre 1080, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands: オランダウトレチトウトレチト
ja.lifeSummary: Hermann van Malsen-Cuijkが1040年9月23日にオランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクで生まれた時，父Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbantは30歳，母NN van Isla en Lakeは20歳であった。1014年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンでAdelaide de Amiensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1080年12月15日に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk(이)가 1040년 9월 23일 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 c이j크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbant(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 NN van Isla en Lake(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1014년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 Adelaide de Amiens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1080년 12월 15일 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk nasceu em 23 de setembro de 1040, em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbant, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, NN van Isla en Lake, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide de Amiens em 1014, em Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1080, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk родился 23 сентября 1040 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Unruoch Freterhard van Teisterbant было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали NN van Isla en Lake, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide de Amiens в 1014 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 декабря 1080 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.

Se casó con Adelaide de Amiens en 1014, en Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1080, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años.
